mapper.insert: insert into model_scenario_routes(scenario, connection_id, model_id, enabled, created_at, updated_at) values(#{scenario}, #{connectionId}, #{modelId}, #{enabled}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})

insert into model_scenario_routes(scenario, connection_id, model_id, enabled, created_at, updated_at) values(#{scenario}, #{connectionId}, #{modelId}, #{enabled}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}) on conflict (scenario) do update set connection_id=excluded.connection_id, model_id=excluded.model_id, enabled=excluded.enabled, updated_at=excluded.updated_at
mapper.select: select r.* from model_scenario_routes r join model_connections c on c.id=r.connection_id join model_connection_models m on m.id=r.model_id and m.connection_id=r.connection_id where r.scenario=#{scenario} and r.enabled and c.owner_type='PLATFORM' and c.status='ACTIVE' and c.deleted_at is null and m.enabled and m.test_status='PASSED' and m.tested_config_version=c.config_version
